About Me

I am a passionate 4th-year Computer Engineering student at Jordan University of Science and Technology (JUST), transitioning from software engineering into the fields of Embedded Systems and IoT. With a strong foundation in programming languages like C, C#, and Python, combined with experience in modern web development, I am actively expanding my expertise into hardware-software integration. My current technical focus includes STM32 microcontroller programming, peripheral configuration (GPIO, Timers, Interrupts, UART, SPI, I2C, ADC), and Embedded C. Equipped with solid academic training in computer architecture, data structures, and control systems, I am highly motivated to secure entry-level roles or internships in the embedded systems domain across Jordan and the Gulf countries.

My Work

⚡ Smart IoT Industrial Monitoring System

Designed the architectural blueprint for an upcoming graduation project focused on real-time industrial telemetry, implementing sensor data acquisition and cloud synchronization via IoT protocols.

⚡ STM32 Peripheral & Firmware Development

Developed and tested low-level driver modules on STM32 microcontrollers, configuring GPIO, hardware timers, nested interrupts, and serial communication (UART, SPI, I2C).

⚡ AI-Assisted Web Development Projects

Utilized modern AI-driven development practices (vibe coding) to rapidly build, test, and deploy functional, full-stack responsive web applications.
